markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content pipeline and AI visibility strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** To bypass SME bottlenecks, the team will prioritize 10 approved topics that require no SME review. A new strategy will also break down existing white papers into blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Strategy:** GrowthX will deliver a dual-path strategy: one path for content that adheres to the no-competitor-mention rule, and another for content that does not, to demonstrate the performance trade-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**New Tooling:** Brooke now has access to "Check That," GrowthX's custom-built AI visibility tool. Brooke will test it against Brandlight for the February monthly report to compare usability and data quality.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**SME Unblocking:** Brooke can now use AI visibility data from "Check That" to make a stronger case to SMEs, explaining how specific articles directly address ranking gaps and accelerate review times.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & SME Bottlenecks

  - [SME review is the primary bottleneck delaying content publication.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**Interim Plan:** Focus on 10 approved topics that require no SME review to maintain publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Technical white paper articles are on hold until Brooke's team reviews the first two drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This review is needed to calibrate the pipeline and avoid rework.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Break down existing white papers into blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create content without triggering new SME reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Pilot:** The "emails" white paper is ideal, with clear sections (e.g., "four-phase evaluation methodology") that can become standalone posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Constraint:** New posts must also be validated for keyword relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### AI Visibility Strategy

  - **Challenge:** The executive directive to be \#1 in AI visibility conflicts with the marketing team's constraint against mentioning competitors.
  - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX will deliver a dual-path strategy in a Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Path A:** Content strategy that adheres to the no-competitor-mention rule.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Path B:** Content strategy that does mention competitors, with projected results.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Purpose:** This comparison will demonstrate the performance trade-offs and build the case for lifting the constraint.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Executive Buy-in:** Brooke has the necessary support from Justin and does not require GrowthX's CEO to intervene.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Need:** Documentation on the value of content for AI visibility, which Brooke can use internally.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Persona Focus:** The AI Laggard and technical developer personas remain the focus.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The developer persona is key for a bottom-up motion targeting LLM visibility (e.g., API documentation).](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Tooling: Check That

  - [Brooke now has access to "Check That," GrowthX's custom-built AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**URL Search:** See top-cited URLs and their citation percentage.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Access vetted, pre-populated prompts with 30 days of historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Custom Prompts:** Create new prompts (signal appears in 24–72 hours).](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Context Management:** Update tracked competitors, products, and personas.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [**Comparison to Brandlight:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
      - [**Usability:** "Check That" is more user-friendly.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Prompt Volume:** Brandlight tracks 3,200 prompts, but many have low "query importance," yielding noisy data. "Check That" aims for a more focused, actionable approach.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Feature Requests for Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [Filter results by specific LLM engine.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [Implement a weighted visibility score (e.g., higher weight for ChatGPT citations).](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Next Test:** Brooke will use "Check That" for the February monthly report to compare its data and usability against Brandlight.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
      - [Get SME review for the two technical white paper articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Test "Check That" for the February monthly report.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
      - [Share the Loom walkthrough with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Invite Justin and the marketing ops person to "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Send the "emails" white paper to the editorial team for breakdown into blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Deliver the dual-path AI visibility strategy in a Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [Resurface the "Check That" Loom walkthrough on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Add Brooke's feature requests (LLM engine filter, weighted score) to the product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/HMZxo3z3zEBvWY_MBEi69XDzzQYshMx4?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
